_doc: Year-as-shares refix Step B (2026-05-31) — EMAN / Charles Dorfman 9581012. Multi-tranche MAR Article 19 template: nested Date|Price|Volume sub-table (50,000 + 5,583 + 71,500 = 127,083) with NO director column; PDMR name from the 'a) Name' KV row; labelled '- Aggregated volume' = 127,083. Pre-fix the parser fell through to the legacy regex and stored shares=2026 (the year bled in). Post-fix: ONE aggregated row, shares=127083, dated to the latest tranche (2026-05-20), shares must NOT equal 2026, no required_fields_missing.
